title: Nar Shaddaa agri-utility crop sprayer
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=Nar Shaddaa agri-utility crop sprayer |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Crop sprayer]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=[[Sublight engine/Legends|Sublight drives]] |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays=[[Docking Bay D-768]] |escapepods= |crew=[[Pilot/Legends|Pilot]] (1) |skeleton= |passengers=5 |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport=[[Life support/Legends|Equipped]] |communications= |othersystems= |role=[[Plant/Legends|Crop]] sprayer, repurposed for use by the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] |commission=By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', which includes the destruction of the Nar Shaddaa agri-utility [[crop sprayer]] on [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]], to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. |destroyed=22 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] |retired= |battles=[[Mission to Qiilura]] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Well, they don't build them like that anymore.''"
"''That's because not even the Hutt Aviation Authority would certify this Narsh dirt-crate airworthy.|RC-8015 and RC-1309|}} A ''' Nar Shaddaa agri-utility crop sprayer''', also referred to as a "'''Narsh dirt-crate'''" by [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Niner Skirata|RC-1309]], was operated by [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Housed in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Fleet Support Air Station]] on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], the [[crop sprayer]] was used by the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] to transport [[Omega Squad]] clone commandos to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] planet [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] on their [[Mission to Qiilura|mission]] to apprehend [[Confederacy of Independent Systems|Separatist]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Ovolot Qail Uthan]]. After entering the planet's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], the vessel succumbed to a [[Bird/Legends|bird]] strike, knocking out its [[Engine/Legends|engines]] and sending the [[Plant/Legends|crop]] sprayer plummeting to Qiilura's surface, where it was destroyed. ==Description== A [[crop sprayer]] repurposed for use by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]], the Nar Shaddaa agri-utility crop sprayer was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] and had been stripped of its internal tanks and equipped with securing straps to contain at least five passengers. To carry living passengers, the [[Plant/Legends|crop]] sprayer was equipped with [[Life support/Legends|life support]] systems. The sprayer also had [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drives]] for [[Realspace/Legends|space]] travel and was capable of [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] flight. The vessel's bulkhead had further been lined with stealth sheeting, rendering its cargo invisible to scans or probes. Featuring with a [[Computer/Legends|console]] to which a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] could be connected, the converted vessel's [[Transponder code/Legends|transponder code]] had been set to broadcast its purpose as a crop sprayer hired to dress [[barq]] fields after a harvest. The crop sprayer shared its name with the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. ==History== {{Quote|Bird strike. Atmos engine's fried.''"
"''Can the R5 glide this thing down?''"
"''It's trying.''"
"''No, that isn't gliding. That's crashing.|RC-1309 and RC-1136|}} The Nar Shaddaa agri-utility crop sprayer was stored in [[Docking Bay D-768]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Fleet Support Air Station]]—an auxiliary of [[Fleet Support]], a structure used by the Grand Army on the Mid Rim planet [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Piloted by a single [[Color/Legends|red]] [[R5-series astromech droid]], the crop sprayer was used to transport the four [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Omega Squad]]—[[Atin Skirata|RC-3222]], [[Niner Skirata|RC-1309]], [[Darman Skirata|RC-1136]], [[Fi Skirata|RC-8015]]—and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Bardan Jusik]] to the Mid Rim{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Qiilura system/Legends|Qiilura system]] world of [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]], where they were assigned to locate and neutralize [[Confederacy of Independent Systems|Separatist]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Ovolot Qail Uthan]] to suspend her progress on a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]]-[[Death/Legends|killing]] [[nanovirus]] named [[FG36]].''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' Under the guise as one of the many crop sprayers that frequented Qiilura after the barq harvest, the craft entered the [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]] planet's airspace successfully. As it neared the final hundred [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] to the designated drop point, the vessel collided with a number of a Qiiluran [[Bird/Legends|avian]] [[Species/Legends|species]], which proceeded to destroy its [[Engine/Legends|engines]] and send it spiraling to the planet's surface. The [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] quickly exited the craft using [[Parachute/Legends|parachutes]], but the crop sprayer crashed shortly after, exploding with its pilot roughly thirty kilometers away from the planned target zone according to an estimation by RC-1136. ==Behind the scenes== The Nar Shaddaa agri-utility crop sprayer appeared in the [[2004]] novel [[Republic Commando: Hard Contact|''Hard Contact'']], the first novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series written by [[Karen Traviss]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Nar-Shaddaa-Agrar-Sprühflieger }} [[Category:Agricultural technology]] [[Category:Crop sprayers]]
